extensions.name: Cold War Crisis
extensions.summary: 1980s total-conversion mod for Zero Hour. Third-party — download from the official ModDB page; we don't host it.
extensions.instructions: 1) Open the Download page and get the v1.5 (v469) package from ModDB. 2) Follow the package's steps to place the mod into your game folder (it ends up as GLM/Cold War Crisis/1.5/_469_CWC.gib). 3) Click “Use downloaded mod…” and select _469_CWC.gib — the launcher runs it via GEN_MOD. There is also a Mac build (477) on the same mod page.
extensions.credits: Cold War Crisis © its authors — see the ModDB page. This launcher only links to the official download and registers the file you download; it does not host or redistribute the mod.

extensions.name: Vehicle Dual Guard
extensions.summary: Two-click Guard-From-Position order on every CWC combat vehicle & aircraft.
extensions.description: Adds the Guard-From-Position (“dual guard”) command to all Cold War Crisis combat vehicles and aircraft (not infantry). First click sets the unit's home position; the second sets a watch zone — the unit attacks anything that enters it and returns home when the threat clears. Purely additive loose INI overrides; removing them fully reverts the add-on. The game engine already carries the mechanic; this just wires the button onto units.
extensions.credits: Built for the third-party Cold War Crisis mod (© its authors — see extensions/vehicle-dual-guard/README.md). The override files here are generated by this project's scripts/cwc_guard_patch.py and contain only additive command-set overrides, none of CWC's own assets.
